full_text_tesim: Joseph the Hymnographer, Kanon on Saints and Martyrs
Joseph the Hymnographer, Kanon on the Saints and Martyrs Peter, Andrew, Dionysius, Paul, Christina, Heraclius, Paulinus, Benedimus
Kanon on the Saints and Martyrs Peter, Andrew, Dionysius, Paul, Christina, Heraclius, Paulinus, Benedimus

One bifolio of the present manuscript is made of one original folio, which measured approximately 200x150 mm. The Schriftspiegel is approximately 170x120 mm, with an upper margin of 20 mm (f. 186r), an outer of 30 mm (f. 183v), and a lower of 45 mm (f. 183v)
